title: Front Office Manager - Zostel - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Zostel - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, Zostel in Srinagar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Zostel:
Zostel is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zostel!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
